Package org.assertj.core.error

Class ShouldHaveAllNullFields

java.lang.Object
org.assertj.core.error.BasicErrorMessageFactory
org.assertj.core.error.ShouldHaveAllNullFields
All Implemented Interfaces:
ErrorMessageFactory
public class ShouldHaveAllNullFields extends BasicErrorMessageFactory
Creates an AssertionError indicating that an assertion that verifies that an object has null fields failed.
Author:
Vladimir Chernikov
